steps.action: Open http://localhost:3002/ and capture desktop form screenshot
steps.expected: Brutalist visual baseline visible in form
steps.observed: Form shows thick black borders, uppercase labels, and black/white styling

steps.action: Submit comparison and capture results screenshot
steps.observed: Results area preserves strong borders and accent styling

steps.action: Inspect computed styles via browser eval
steps.expected: #f5f5f5 background, uppercase labels, monospace data, >=2px black borders, #0055FF accent
steps.observed: bodyBg=rgb(245, 245, 245); label textTransform=uppercase; border widths sampled at 2px; monospace fonts detected; accent rgb(0, 85, 255) present

assertions.title: Touch targets >= 44px on mobile

steps.action: Set viewport to 375x812 and capture screenshot
steps.expected: Mobile layout at 375px is testable for touch target sizing

steps.action: Inspect visible interactive element dimensions via browser eval
steps.expected: All buttons and interactive elements are >=44px in touch-target dimensions
steps.observed: Several visible inputs are 39px tall (Chain, From Token, To Token, Amount), below 44px

assertions.issues: Measured under-44px interactive elements at 375px: Chain input 351x39, From input 351x39, To input 351x39, Amount input 351x39.

evidence.network: Read/Grep/terminal output: docker-compose.yml service='flashprofits'; no spandex-router matches
Read/Grep/terminal output: docker-stack.yml service='flashprofits'; no spandex-router matches

steps.action: Verify tokens/amount were changed before submit
steps.expected: Form reflects changed tokens and amount
Comparison request succeeds and preferences can be persisted
steps.observed: Compare succeeded; endpoint validation also returned HTTP 200 for same params

steps.action: Open base URL without query params after save
steps.observed: Restored values: Base (8453), USDC->WETH addresses above, Amount=2.75, Slippage=50

evidence.network: GET /compare?chainId=8453&from=0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913&to=0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000006&amount=2.75&slippageBps=50 -> 200; localStorage flashprofits-preferences includes matching chainId/from/to/amount/slippage

frictions.description: Playwright MCP browser launch was blocked by an existing Chrome profile lock ('Opening in existing browser session').
frictions.resolution: Switched to the prescribed agent-browser tool with isolated session id suffix 6aadfdbb751f__cssdock.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request log returned an empty request list during this run.
frictions.resolution: Captured API evidence for the compared request using curl with HTTP status and response-shape checks.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 4 passed (VAL-CSS-004, VAL-DOCK-001, VAL-DOCK-002, VAL-CROSS-002) and 1 failed (VAL-CSS-005: several interactive inputs are 39px tall at 375px, below the 44px target).
